sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, or Other as specified in the tender. The pricing schedule should be completed as specified in the tender documents, referencing annexes where required.

The Supplier confirms acceptance of the draft contract terms as outlined in the tender documents. A PDF copy of the Supplier's Deed of Undertaking, duly signed, is included as part of the Quotation submission.

The Supplier's performance against the Performance Measures will be measured under the Work Order and may impact the Supplier's entitlement to any At Risk Amount or the Commonwealth's entitlement to any Service Credits. The project management methodology will include regular performance reviews to ensure compliance with these measures.

The Supplier will deliver the following Plans as part of the transition approach: Australian Industry Capability (AIC) Plan, Transition-In Plan, Phase-Out Plan, Supplier Risk Management Plan, Service Management Plan, Disaster Recovery Plan, and Test Plan. These plans will ensure a smooth transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out.

Sustainment of eTools and DDM must be undertaken from a Physical Zone 3 (as certified under the DSPF) or higher site. The security framework will align with the Australian Government's Information Security Manual (ISM) and the ACSC Essential Eight mitigation strategies.
The Supplier will provide Key Persons for the following Key Positions, ensuring that all personnel have the necessary qualifications and relevant experience to meet the project requirements.
